results.title: Support group, others congratulate Ora’nkan over emergence as Accord candidate for Oyo Central
results.description: The leadership of the Ora’nkan Support Group (OSG), Accord faithful and Irorun-Ni Charitable Foundation (ICF) Nigeria have congratulated Ambassador Shakirullah Jimoh Ora’nkan on his emergence as the Accord candidate for Oyo Central Senatorial District. The group said the development became evident following the publication of candidates’ names on the Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) portal, [...] The post Support group, others congratulate Ora’nkan over emergence as Accord candidate for Oyo Central appeared first on Tribune Online .

results.title: The uses of violence (Dem lawmaker changed Israel aid vote)
results.description: The combination of anti-Semitism and violence on the left deamands attention. It is a toxic brew. Democrat Washington Rep. Adam Smith provides a recent example in connection with his vote against aid to Israel this week. Matthew Shea reports at Jewish Insider (links in original): Rep. Adam Smith (D-WA), the top Democrat on the House Armed Services Committee, indicated he voted to cut off military aid to Israel in part because of sustained personal threats against his family and his staff, part of what he described as a violent and relentless campaign of intimidation by far-left anti-Israel activists. Smith voted...
